proposed_catalog_row.Paper: Investment shocks and the relative price of investment
proposed_catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Two investment shocks; IST identified by relative price of investment; MEI shock; Calvo price and wage rigidities; habit; utilization; investment adjustment costs

proposed_status_row.paper_title: Investment shocks and the relative price of investment
proposed_status_row.raw_pdf_path: raw/mmb_papers/Investment shocks and the relative price of investment.pdf
proposed_status_row.notes: First-pass bilingual derivation. Several inferred FOCs and stationary normalizations require source-level review. Dynare not run.

unresolved_issues: Several nonlinear FOCs are inferred from printed optimization problems and are marked needs_review.
The recursive Calvo price and wage Phillips-curve forms are not explicitly printed in the main Markdown model section.
The exact stationary normalization of marginal cost, utilization cost, and the capital-producer Q condition requires source-level checking.
